ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the data was collected */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was collected */,
  "cloudiness" INTEGER /* Percentage of cloud cover */,
  "humidity" INTEGER /* Percentage of humidity */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the data collection location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the data collection location */,
  "max_temp" REAL /* Maximum temperature recorded */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed recorded */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "collected_by" TEXT /* Name of the entity that collected the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was last updated */,
  "weather_version" INTEGER /* Version of the weather data entry */,
  "data_source_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the data source for each entry */,
  "collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the data was collected (e.g., hourly, daily) */,
  "sensor_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the sensor or device that collected the data */,
  "data_validity" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the data is valid */,
  "rainfall" REAL /* Amount of rainfall recorded */,
  "atmospheric_pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure recorded */,
  "solar_radiation" REAL /* Solar radiation recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_data_quality FOREIGN KEY ("data_quality") REFERENCES data_quality ("quality_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_collected_by FOREIGN KEY ("collected_by") REFERENCES data_collection_methods ("method_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the city is located */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the city */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the city in meters */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the city center */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the city center */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the city in square kilometers */,
  "average_temperature" REAL /* Average temperature of the city */,
  "average_humidity" INTEGER /* Average humidity of the city */,
  "average_cloudiness" INTEGER /* Average cloudiness of the city */,
  "average_wind_speed" REAL /* Average wind speed of the city */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the city data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language spoken in the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  "subregion" TEXT /* Subregion where the country is located */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "average_temperature" REAL /* Average temperature of the country */,
  "average_humidity" INTEGER /* Average humidity of the country */,
  "average_cloudiness" INTEGER /* Average cloudiness of the country */,
  "average_wind_speed" REAL /* Average wind speed of the country */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the country data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., weather station, satellite) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data provided by the source */,
  "last_verified" TEXT /* Date and time when the data source was last verified */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the data source */,
  "collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the data is collected */,
  "last_maintenance" TEXT /* Date and time when the data source was last maintained */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the data source (e.g., active, inactive, under maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user is affiliated with */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the weather data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the weather data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality level */,
  "quality_name" TEXT /* Name of the quality level (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the quality level */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Color code associated with the quality level */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold values for the quality level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the collection method (e.g., ground-based, satellite) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the collection method */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor used for data collection */,
  "last_calibrated" TEXT /* Date and time when the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "calibration_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the sensor is calibrated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather forecast */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city for which the forecast is generated */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date of the forecast */,
  "forecast_time" TEXT /* Time of the forecast */,
  "predicted_cloudiness" INTEGER /* Predicted percentage of cloud cover */,
  "predicted_humidity" INTEGER /* Predicted percentage of humidity */,
  "predicted_max_temp" REAL /* Predicted maximum temperature */,
  "predicted_wind_speed" REAL /* Predicted wind speed */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the forecast (0-1) */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model used for the forecast */,
  "forecast_version" INTEGER /* Version of the forecast */,
  "forecast_valid_until" TEXT /* Date and time until which the forecast is valid */,
  "forecast_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_forecasts_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES forecast_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_forecasts_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the forecast model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used by the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "last_trained" TEXT /* Date and time when the model was last trained */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model (0-1) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the model was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the model was last updated */,
  "training_data_source" TEXT /* Source of the training data used for the model */,
  "validation_metrics" TEXT /* Metrics used to validate the model (e.g., RMSE, MAE) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)
